JavaScript tests for string handling, type differences, object creation, closures, and Unicode comparison.


## Files
- **[06-001.js](06-001.js.md)**: Tests string character access and Unicode handling in JavaScript.
- **[06-002.js](06-002.js.md)**: Tests the type difference between `a.print.toString` and `b.print.toString` after modification.
- **[06-003.js](06-003.js.md)**: Tests object creation and method functionality in JavaScript.
- **[06-004.js](06-004.js.md)**: Tests function closures and variable scope in JavaScript.
